changes: NEW: Reworked Entity Manager — entities now display as visual card grids with separate layouts for characters, locations, groups, and lore; notes, twists, and TODOs remain as compact list rows; annotations have their own inspector view.
NEW: Entity Command Palette (Alt+E) — floating search popup to filter and link existing entities or create new ones; fully keyboard navigable.
NEW: configurable keyboard shortcuts in Project Settings → Hotkeys.
NEW: Quick Note popup type badge (Note / Fix / Suggestion / Idea) with Tab to cycle — type is saved as prefix on the note.

Settings: NLP tab now shows a language capability matrix with model install status instead of checkboxes; Advanced tab: epistemic filtering toggle removed; Hotkeys tab added with all shortcuts editable inline.

Settings: Species/Race field hidden when disabled; 'World Time' tab hidden when Dual Timeline disabled; Custom Calendar config hidden when disabled; model download prompt now says 'Required for analysis features'.
Project setup questionnaire now includes Story Language selector.
FIX: Context menu no longer clips off-screen with many typo suggestions.

NEW: The Janitor — a smart right panel that passively analyzes your chapter and surfaces actionable writing suggestions. Unlinked entity names, spelling errors, weak word overuse, and Show/Don't Tell patterns are detected and can be fixed with one click.
Janitor detects unlinked entity names and offers one-click linking; identifies entity name fragments and suggests aliases; flags misspelled words with Hunspell spell-checking.

Janitor analyzes Show/Don't Tell patterns including emotion labeling, filter verbs, cognitive verbs, and emotion adverbs on speech. Four independent detection modes are toggleable in Project Settings with a sensitivity slider.
Janitor also detects weak adverbs and passive voice as separate suggestion types, each with distinct icons and colors.
Suggested words are highlighted in context snippets; clicking navigates to that word. Analysis runs automatically after 100 new words or 10 seconds of inactivity.
Dismissed suggestions are remembered per chapter. Alt+J opens the panel with keyboard navigation support (arrow keys to move, Y to accept, N to dismiss).
NEW: App Update Checker — users are now notified when a new FleshNote IDE release is available.
Janitor panels are completely hidden during focus/sprint modes. Panel collapse state is saved between sessions.
NEW: Daily writing prompt popup — context-aware scene, character, and worldbuilding prompts when you open a project after a break.
NEW: Annotation system — right-click text to attach an inline note. Annotations export as numbered footnotes in DOCX, HTML, PDF, and EPUB.
Modified: Entity Extractor now has flip alias-name option, and a wider window for comfortable extraction
Export modal: Live Preview and Book View are now separate tabs; preview is shown by default.
Export modal: chapter selection — choose which chapters to include via checkbox list.
Export modal: TXT and MD previews now show plain monospace output instead of styled HTML.
Export modal: 'Show in Folder' button in the success notification.
FIX: twist and foreshadow markers now strip cleanly in Prose and With Annotations modes.
FIX: Full Annotated mode preserves entity and twist styling in DOCX instead of flattening to plain text.
FIX: DOCX margins corrected to industry-standard values with mirror layout for book binding.
FIX: Default World Calendar now uses the correct default month names.
FIX: Removed legacy 'Milestones' checkbox during project onboarding, and project settings.

NEW: Sketchboards! Create unlimited visual node-graph boards to map systems, magic, relationships, and lore. Right-click the canvas to add nodes (link to existing entities or create standalone concepts), draw connections with customizable dash styles and 16-color palette, and auto-staggered parallel connections prevent overlap. Boards persist to the project database.

Sketchboard enhancements: board icons are now clickable to open a symbol picker with Old Hungarian Unicode characters, Egyptian hieroglyphs, and technical symbols (using the bundled NotoSansOldHungarian font). Time spent in Sketchboards counts toward Plotting time in Analytics.
All Time Gutter and Time Override UI strings fully translated to Hungarian, Polish, and Arabic.
Focus/Sprint mode selector is now a two-step flow: pick your mode first, then set your word count goal — so you're never forced into a default you didn't intend.
Stats, World & History, and Entity Manager buttons are now locked while a focus or sprint mode is active. Finish your sprint to access them.
Knowledge state entries are now clickable — clicking one navigates to the exact position in the chapter where it was linked.
Knowledge state entries now have an Edit button, so you can fix the fact text or secret flag without deleting and recreating.
Fixed relationship card Edit and Delete buttons overlapping each other — they now sit in a clear bottom bar alongside the chapter and world-time info.

NEW: Time Overrides! Mark passages with different in-universe dates directly in the editor (for flashbacks, memories, and timeskips). Select text, right-click, and choose 'Time Override'. The time gutter shows colored bars aligned to marked text and updates automatically as you edit.
Relationship turning point and knowledge state popups now auto-fill the world date from the active time override at cursor position.
Time overrides persist per-chapter across sessions.
NEW: Synonym Lookup! Select a word and look up synonyms directly in the editor, fully localized and supporting context-aware languages (including Hungarian!).
NEW: Editor Markers for Knowledge and Relationships! Knowledge and relationship states are now visually linked in the editor, similar to characters and twists.
Expanded the Entity Link Visibility Toggle to include Quick Notes, Knowledge Markers, and Relationship Markers.
NEW: Non-linear Relationship Tracker! Track evolving character feelings, supporting one-sided emotions and chapter-based historical states.
NEW: Calendar Customization! Define your world's unique time system with custom months, seasons, and epoch labels.
NEW: Export Status Bar localization and general UI polish for international users.
Renamed 'Make Connection' to 'Add to Knowledge' for better clarity in the epistemic system.
NEW: World History Timeline! Keep track of events that happened before your book begins or visualize your story's chronology in a dedicated panel.
Added entity-specific timeline lanes for better character and location history tracking.
NEW: Entity Manager! Bulk-delete unused entries or merge duplicate characters and lore into a single primary record.
Improved entity search and filtering in the management view.
NEW: Achievements System! Track your writing journey with unlockable badges for consistency, word count, and hidden milestones.
Added Achievements tab to the main sidebar for checking your progression.
NEW: Stats Dashboard! Deep analytics for your project including Story Health diagnostics, writing habits, and Entity Appearance Auditor.
Visualized word count velocity and time auditing across chapters.
NEW: Entity Deletion! You can now permanently delete Characters, Locations, Groups, and Lore from the Entity Inspector.
NEW: Duplicate Entity Prevention! The Editor will now intercept duplicate character/location/item creations, showing warnings for Exact Matches.
NEW: Alias Suggestions! If you create a highly similar named entity, the Editor will suggest adding it as an alias to existing ones instead.
NEW: Entity Link Visibility Toggle! You can now easily hide specific entity links (like Characters or Locations) using the Eye icon in the editor toolbar.
NEW: Dynamic Category Dropdowns! The Lore Inspector and Custom Lore popup now extract live categories from your database instead of using hardcoded lists.
Revamped Project Setup! 'Extra Lore Categories' now uses a visual chip list and includes smart 1-click genre suggestions.
Fixed glitchy animations when Editor popups appear.
Fixed Twist Inspector's save button getting pushed off-screen by long twist titles.
Cleaned up redundant 'Lore Categories' field from Project Settings window.
NEW: Twist & Foreshadow system reworked! Tag text as twist reveals or foreshadowing markers and link them to named twists.
NEW: Twist Inspector panel — view twist status, foreshadow count, distance to reveal, characters who know, and navigate to foreshadow markers.
Renamed 'Foreshadow' context menu button to 'Twist' with sub-options for Twist Reveal and Foreshadowing.
Clicking any twist or foreshadow marker in the editor now opens the Twist Inspector.
In the planner, twists are displayed as little markers on the timeline.
Fixed a bug where entering and exiting the planner would overwrite the story with an old version.
Added saving indicator in the corner for peace of mind.
Kamikaze mode's timer adjusted.
Fixed Momentum mode crashing the app.
Fixed app text fields becoming uneditable if you attempt to create a project with an existing project name.
Localized strings for the planner.
Removed dummy fields from project setup like age.
Fixed bug where a chapter tagged as 'final' wouldn't show the bar on the timeline as filled up green.
NEW: plot planner! Prepare your story arcs and beats.
NEW: focus sprint modes! Kamikaze, Fog, Hemingway, Combo, Zen
You can now link to existing entries via @name syntax
Search functionality (CTRL+F)
TODO (alt+t) inline addition
Dyslexia friendly mode added into accessibility settings
Knowledge state reworked, now it works globally chapter level instead of requiring a POV character.
Fixed Item entities not being colored in the editor.
Fixed not being able to escape entity links via pressing space/enter
Code cleanup.
Optimized the entity extractor.
Cool loading screen while the entity extractor does it's thing
Finalized the icon of the app.
Added fancy home screen text.
Reworked the import module for entities.
Implemented Professional Export Module with support for PDF, DOCX, and EPUB.
Added 'Book-Ready' formatting logic for industry-standard print exports.
Added Live Export Preview with real-time formatting visualization.
Enhanced PDF export stability and CSS variable resolution.
